1→package com.fsck.k9.preferences
  2→
  3→import android.content.Context
  4→import app.k9mail.legacy.account.Account
  5→import com.fsck.k9.AccountPreferenceSerializer.Companion.ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION_KEY
  6→import com.fsck.k9.AccountPreferenceSerializer.Companion.INCOMING_SERVER_SETTINGS_KEY
  7→import com.fsck.k9.AccountPreferenceSerializer.Companion.OUTGOING_SERVER_SETTINGS_KEY
  8→import com.fsck.k9.Core
  9→import com.fsck.k9.Preferences
 10→import com.fsck.k9.ServerSettingsSerializer
 11→import com.fsck.k9.mailstore.SpecialLocalFoldersCreator
 12→import java.util.UUID
 13→import kotlinx.datetime.Clock
 14→
 15→internal class AccountSettingsWriter(
 16→    private val preferences: Preferences,
 17→    private val localFoldersCreator: SpecialLocalFoldersCreator,
 18→    private val clock: Clock,
 19→    serverSettingsSerializer: ServerSettingsSerializer,
 20→    private val context: Context,
 21→) {
 22→    private val identitySettingsWriter = IdentitySettingsWriter()
 23→    private val folderSettingsWriter = FolderSettingsWriter()
 24→    private val serverSettingsWriter = ServerSettingsWriter(serverSettingsSerializer)
 25→
 26→    fun write(account: ValidatedSettings.Account): Pair<AccountDescription, AccountDescription> {
 27→        val editor = preferences.createStorageEditor()
 28→
 29→        val originalAccountName = account.name!!
 30→        val originalAccountUuid = account.uuid
 31→        val originalAccount = AccountDescription(originalAccountName, originalAccountUuid)
 32→
 33→        val accountUuid = getUniqueAccountUuid(originalAccountUuid)
 34→        val accountName = getUniqueAccountName(originalAccountName)
 35→        val writtenAccount = AccountDescription(accountName, accountUuid)
 36→
 37→        editor.putStringWithLogging("$accountUuid.$ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION_KEY", accountName)
 38→
 39→        // Convert account settings to the string representation used in preference storage
 40→        val stringSettings = AccountSettingsDescriptions.convert(account.settings)
 41→
 42→        for ((accountKey, value) in stringSettings) {
 43→            editor.putStringWithLogging("$accountUuid.$accountKey", value)
 44→        }
 45→
 46→        val newAccountNumber = preferences.generateAccountNumber().toString()
 47→        editor.putStringWithLogging("$accountUuid.accountNumber", newAccountNumber)
 48→
 49→        // When deleting an account and then restoring it using settings import, the same account UUID will be used.
 50→        // To avoid reusing a previously existing notification channel ID, we need to make sure to use a unique value
 51→        // for `messagesNotificationChannelVersion`.
 52→        val messageNotificationChannelVersion = clock.now().epochSeconds.toString()
 53→        editor.putStringWithLogging(
 54→            key = "$accountUuid.messagesNotificationChannelVersion",
 55→            value = messageNotificationChannelVersion,
 56→        )
 57→
 58→        serverSettingsWriter.writeServerSettings(
 59→            editor,
 60→            key = "$accountUuid.$INCOMING_SERVER_SETTINGS_KEY",
 61→            server = account.incoming,
 62→        )
 63→        serverSettingsWriter.writeServerSettings(
 64→            editor,
 65→            key = "$accountUuid.$OUTGOING_SERVER_SETTINGS_KEY",
 66→            server = account.outgoing,
 67→        )
 68→
 69→        writeIdentities(editor, accountUuid, account.identities)
 70→        writeFolders(editor, accountUuid, account.folders)
 71→
 72→        updateAccountUuids(editor, accountUuid)
 73→
 74→        if (!editor.commit()) {
 75→            error("Failed to commit account settings")
 76→        }
 77→
 78→        // Reload accounts so the new account can be picked up by Preferences.getAccount()
 79→        preferences.loadAccounts()
 80→
 81→        val appAccount = preferences.getAccount(accountUuid) ?: error("Failed to load account: $accountUuid")
 82→        localFoldersCreator.createSpecialLocalFolders(appAccount)
 83→
 84→        Core.setServicesEnabled(context)
 85→
 86→        return originalAccount to writtenAccount
 87→    }
 88→
 89→    private fun updateAccountUuids(editor: StorageEditor, accountUuid: String) {
 90→        val oldAccountUuids = preferences.storage.getString("accountUuids", "")
 91→            .split(',')
 92→            .dropLastWhile { it.isEmpty() }
 93→        val newAccountUuids = oldAccountUuids + accountUuid
 94→
 95→        val newAccountUuidString = newAccountUuids.joinToString(separator = ",")
 96→        editor.putStringWithLogging("accountUuids", newAccountUuidString)
 97→    }
 98→
 99→    private fun writeIdentities(
100→        editor: StorageEditor,
101→        accountUuid: String,
102→        identities: List<ValidatedSettings.Identity>,
103→    ) {
104→        for ((index, identity) in identities.withIndex()) {
105→            identitySettingsWriter.write(editor, accountUuid, index, identity)
106→        }
107→    }
108→
109→    private fun writeFolders(editor: StorageEditor, accountUuid: String, folders: List<ValidatedSettings.Folder>) {
110→        for (folder in folders) {
111→            folderSettingsWriter.write(editor, accountUuid, folder)
112→        }
113→    }
114→
115→    private fun getUniqueAccountUuid(accountUuid: String): String {
116→        val existingAccount = preferences.getAccount(accountUuid)
117→        return if (existingAccount != null) {
118→            // An account with this UUID already exists. So generate a new UUID.
119→            UUID.randomUUID().toString()
120→        } else {
121→            accountUuid
122→        }
123→    }
124→
125→    private fun getUniqueAccountName(accountName: String): String {
126→        val accounts = preferences.getAccounts()
127→        if (!isAccountNameUsed(accountName, accounts)) {
128→            return accountName
129→        }
130→
131→        // Account name is already in use. So generate a new one by appending " (x)", where x is the first
132→        // number >= 1 that results in an unused account name.
133→        for (i in 1..accounts.size) {
134→            val newAccountName = "$accountName ($i)"
135→            if (!isAccountNameUsed(newAccountName, accounts)) {
136→                return newAccountName
137→            }
138→        }
139→

 20→@Suppress("TooManyFunctions")
 21→class FolderRepository(
 22→    private val messageStoreManager: MessageStoreManager,
 23→    private val ioDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher = Dispatchers.IO,
 24→) {
 25→    fun getFolder(account: Account, folderId: Long): Folder? {
 26→        val messageStore = messageStoreManager.getMessageStore(account)
 27→        return messageStore.getFolder(folderId) { folder ->
 28→            Folder(
 29→                id = folder.id,
 30→                name = folder.name,
 31→                type = folderTypeOf(account, folder.id),
 32→                isLocalOnly = folder.isLocalOnly,
 33→            )
 34→        }
 35→    }
 36→
 37→    fun getFolderDetails(account: Account, folderId: Long): FolderDetails? {
 38→        val messageStore = messageStoreManager.getMessageStore(account)
 39→        return messageStore.getFolder(folderId) { folder ->
 40→            FolderDetails(
 41→                folder = Folder(
 42→                    id = folder.id,
 43→                    name = folder.name,
 44→                    type = folderTypeOf(account, folder.id),
 45→                    isLocalOnly = folder.isLocalOnly,
 46→                ),
 47→                isInTopGroup = folder.isInTopGroup,
 48→                isIntegrate = folder.isIntegrate,
 49→                isSyncEnabled = folder.isSyncEnabled,
 50→                isVisible = folder.isVisible,
 51→                isNotificationsEnabled = folder.isNotificationsEnabled,
 52→                isPushEnabled = folder.isPushEnabled,
 53→            )
 54→        }
 55→    }
 56→
 57→    fun getRemoteFolders(account: Account): List<RemoteFolder> {
 58→        val messageStore = messageStoreManager.getMessageStore(account)
 59→        return messageStore.getFolders(excludeLocalOnly = true) { folder ->
 60→            RemoteFolder(
 61→                id = folder.id,
 62→                serverId = folder.serverIdOrThrow(),
 63→                name = folder.name,
 64→                type = folder.type.toFolderType(),
 65→            )
 66→        }
 67→    }
 68→
 69→    fun getRemoteFolderDetails(account: Account): List<RemoteFolderDetails> {
 70→        val messageStore = messageStoreManager.getMessageStore(account)
 71→        return messageStore.getFolders(excludeLocalOnly = true) { folder ->
 72→            RemoteFolderDetails(
 73→                folder = RemoteFolder(
 74→                    id = folder.id,
 75→                    serverId = folder.serverIdOrThrow(),
 76→                    name = folder.name,
 77→                    type = folder.type.toFolderType(),
 78→                ),
 79→                isInTopGroup = folder.isInTopGroup,
 80→                isIntegrate = folder.isIntegrate,
 81→                isSyncEnabled = folder.isSyncEnabled,
 82→                isVisible = folder.isVisible,
 83→                isNotificationsEnabled = folder.isNotificationsEnabled,
 84→                isPushEnabled = folder.isPushEnabled,
 85→            )
 86→        }
 87→    }
 88→
 89→    fun getPushFoldersFlow(account: Account): Flow<List<RemoteFolder>> {
 90→        val messageStore = messageStoreManager.getMessageStore(account)
 91→        return callbackFlow {
 92→            send(getPushFolders(account))
 93→
 94→            val listener = FolderSettingsChangedListener {
 95→                trySendBlocking(getPushFolders(account))
 96→            }
 97→            messageStore.addFolderSettingsChangedListener(listener)
 98→
 99→            awaitClose {
100→                messageStore.removeFolderSettingsChangedListener(listener)
101→            }
102→        }.buffer(capacity = Channel.CONFLATED)
103→            .distinctUntilChanged()
104→            .flowOn(ioDispatcher)
105→    }
106→
107→    private fun getPushFolders(account: Account): List<RemoteFolder> {
108→        return getRemoteFolderDetails(account)
109→            .asSequence()
110→            .filter { folderDetails -> folderDetails.isPushEnabled }
111→            .map { folderDetails -> folderDetails.folder }
112→            .toList()
113→    }
114→
115→    fun getFolderServerId(account: Account, folderId: Long): String? {
116→        val messageStore = messageStoreManager.getMessageStore(account)
117→        return messageStore.getFolder(folderId) { folder ->
118→            folder.serverId
119→        }
120→    }
121→
122→    fun getFolderId(account: Account, folderServerId: String): Long? {
123→        val messageStore = messageStoreManager.getMessageStore(account)
124→        return messageStore.getFolderId(folderServerId)
125→    }
126→
127→    fun isFolderPresent(account: Account, folderId: Long): Boolean {
128→        val messageStore = messageStoreManager.getMessageStore(account)
129→        return messageStore.getFolder(folderId) { true } ?: false
130→    }
131→
132→    fun updateFolderDetails(account: Account, folderDetails: FolderDetails) {
133→        val messageStore = messageStoreManager.getMessageStore(account)
134→        messageStore.updateFolderSettings(folderDetails)
135→    }
136→
137→    fun setIncludeInUnifiedInbox(account: Account, folderId: Long, includeInUnifiedInbox: Boolean) {
138→        val messageStore = messageStoreManager.getMessageStore(account)
139→        messageStore.setIncludeInUnifiedInbox(folderId, includeInUnifiedInbox)
140→    }
141→
142→    fun setVisible(account: Account, folderId: Long, visible: Boolean) {
143→        val messageStore = messageStoreManager.getMessageStore(account)
144→        messageStore.setVisible(folderId, visible)
145→    }
146→
147→    fun setSyncEnabled(account: Account, folderId: Long, enable: Boolean) {
148→        val messageStore = messageStoreManager.getMessageStore(account)
149→        messageStore.setSyncEnabled(folderId, enable)
150→    }

152→    fun setNotificationsEnabled(account: Account, folderId: Long, enable: Boolean) {
153→        val messageStore = messageStoreManager.getMessageStore(account)
154→        messageStore.setNotificationsEnabled(folderId, enable)
155→    }
156→
157→    fun setPushDisabled(account: Account) {
158→        val messageStore = messageStoreManager.getMessageStore(account)
159→        messageStore.setPushDisabled()
160→    }
161→
162→    fun hasPushEnabledFolder(account: Account): Boolean {
163→        val messageStore = messageStoreManager.getMessageStore(account)
164→        return messageStore.hasPushEnabledFolder()
165→    }
166→
167→    fun hasPushEnabledFolderFlow(account: Account): Flow<Boolean> {
168→        val messageStore = messageStoreManager.getMessageStore(account)
169→        return callbackFlow {
170→            send(hasPushEnabledFolder(account))

172→            val listener = FolderSettingsChangedListener {

179→            }
180→        }.buffer(capacity = Channel.CONFLATED)
181→            .distinctUntilChanged()

352→        // Write email address belonging to the identity

366→        // Write identity settings
367→        serializer.startTag(null, SETTINGS_ELEMENT)
368→        for ((key, value) in prefs) {
369→            val valueString = value.toString()
370→
371→            val comps = key.split(".")
372→            if (comps.size < 3) {
373→                // Skip non-identity config entries
374→                continue
375→            }
376→
377→            val keyUuid = comps[0]
378→            val identityKey = comps[1]
379→            val identityIndex = comps[2]
380→            if (keyUuid != accountUuid || identityIndex != identity) {
381→                // Skip entries that belong to another identity
382→                continue
383→            }
384→
385→            val versionedSetting = IdentitySettingsDescriptions.SETTINGS[identityKey]
386→            if (versionedSetting != null) {
387→                val highestVersion = versionedSetting.lastKey()
388→                val setting = versionedSetting[highestVersion]
389→                if (setting != null) {
390→                    // Only write settings that have an entry in IdentitySettings.SETTINGS
391→                    try {
392→                        writeKeyAndPrettyValueFromSetting(serializer, identityKey, setting, valueString)
393→                    } catch (e: InvalidSettingValueException) {
394→                        Timber.w(
395→                            "Identity setting \"%s\" has invalid value \"%s\" in preference storage. " +
396→                                "This shouldn't happen!",

398→                            valueString,
399→                        )
400→                    }
401→                }
402→            }
403→        }
404→        serializer.endTag(null, SETTINGS_ELEMENT)
405→
406→        serializer.endTag(null, IDENTITY_ELEMENT)
407→    }

409→    private fun writeFolder(serializer: XmlSerializer, folder: FolderSettings) {
410→        serializer.startTag(null, FOLDER_ELEMENT)
411→        serializer.attribute(null, NAME_ATTRIBUTE, folder.serverId)
412→
413→        // Write folder settings
414→        writeFolderSetting(serializer, "integrate", folder.isIntegrate.toString())
415→        writeFolderSetting(serializer, "inTopGroup", folder.isInTopGroup.toString())
416→        writeFolderSetting(serializer, "syncEnabled", folder.isSyncEnabled.toString())
417→        writeFolderSetting(serializer, "visible", folder.isVisible.toString())
418→        writeFolderSetting(serializer, "notificationsEnabled", folder.isNotificationsEnabled.toString())
419→        writeFolderSetting(serializer, "pushEnabled", folder.isPushEnabled.toString())
420→
421→        serializer.endTag(null, FOLDER_ELEMENT)
422→    }

424→    private fun writeFolderSetting(serializer: XmlSerializer, key: String, value: String) {
425→        val versionedSetting = FolderSettingsDescriptions.SETTINGS[key]
426→        if (versionedSetting != null) {
427→            val highestVersion = versionedSetting.lastKey()
428→            val setting = versionedSetting[highestVersion]
429→            if (setting != null) {
430→                // Only write settings that have an entry in FolderSettings.SETTINGS
431→                try {
432→                    writeKeyAndPrettyValueFromSetting(serializer, key, setting, value)
433→                } catch (e: InvalidSettingValueException) {
434→                    Timber.w(
435→                        "Folder setting \"%s\" has invalid value \"%s\" in preference storage. This shouldn't happen!",
436→                        key,
437→                        value,
438→                    )
439→                }
440→            }
441→        }
442→    }

444→    private fun writeElement(serializer: XmlSerializer, elementName: String, value: String?) {
445→        if (value != null) {
446→            serializer.startTag(null, elementName)
447→            serializer.text(value)
448→            serializer.endTag(null, elementName)
449→        }
450→    }

452→    private fun <T> writeKeyAndPrettyValueFromSetting(
453→        serializer: XmlSerializer,
454→        key: String,
455→        setting: SettingsDescription<T>,
456→        valueString: String,
457→    ) {
458→        val value = setting.fromString(valueString)
459→        val outputValue = setting.toPrettyString(value)
460→        writeKeyAndPrettyValueFromSetting(serializer, key, outputValue)
461→    }
462→
463→    private fun <T> writeKeyAndDefaultValueFromSetting(
464→        serializer: XmlSerializer,
465→        key: String,
466→        setting: SettingsDescription<T>,
467→    ) {
468→        val value = setting.getDefaultValue()
469→        val outputValue = setting.toPrettyString(value)
470→        writeKeyAndPrettyValueFromSetting(serializer, key, outputValue)
471→    }

473→    private fun writeKeyAndPrettyValueFromSetting(serializer: XmlSerializer, key: String, literalValue: String?) {
474→        serializer.startTag(null, VALUE_ELEMENT)
475→        serializer.attribute(null, KEY_ATTRIBUTE, key)
476→        if (literalValue != null) {
477→            serializer.text(literalValue)
478→        }
479→        serializer.endTag(null, VALUE_ELEMENT)
480→    }

482→    fun generateDatedExportFileName(): String {
483→        val now = Calendar.getInstance()
484→        val dateFormat = SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd", Locale.US)
485→        return String.format("%s_%s.%s", EXPORT_FILENAME_PREFIX, dateFormat.format(now.time), EXPORT_FILENAME_SUFFIX)
486→    }

298→    private fun writeFolderNameSettings(
299→        account: Account,

301→        serializer: XmlSerializer,
302→    ) {
303→        fun writeFolderNameSetting(
304→            key: String,
305→            folderId: Long?,
306→            importedFolderServerId: String?,
307→            writeEmptyValue: Boolean = false,
308→        ) {
309→            val folderServerId = folderId?.let {
310→                folderRepository.getFolderServerId(account, folderId)

312→
313→            if (folderServerId != null) {

 9→import kotlinx.coroutines.SupervisorJob

11→
12→class FolderSettingsDataStore(
13→    private val folderRepository: FolderRepository,
14→    private val account: Account,
15→    private var folder: FolderDetails,
16→    private val saveScope: CoroutineScope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.IO),
17→) : PreferenceDataStore() {
18→
19→    override fun getBoolean(key: String?, defValue: Boolean): Boolean {
20→        return when (key) {
21→            "folder_settings_in_top_group" -> folder.isInTopGroup
22→            "folder_settings_include_in_integrated_inbox" -> folder.isIntegrate
23→            "folder_settings_sync" -> folder.isSyncEnabled
24→            "folder_settings_notifications" -> folder.isNotificationsEnabled
25→            "folder_settings_push" -> folder.isPushEnabled
26→            "folder_settings_visible" -> folder.isVisible
27→            else -> error("Unknown key: $key")
28→        }
29→    }
30→
31→    override fun putBoolean(key: String?, value: Boolean) {
32→        return when (key) {
33→            "folder_settings_in_top_group" -> updateFolder(folder.copy(isInTopGroup = value))
34→            "folder_settings_include_in_integrated_inbox" -> updateFolder(folder.copy(isIntegrate = value))
35→            "folder_settings_sync" -> updateFolder(folder.copy(isSyncEnabled = value))
36→            "folder_settings_notifications" -> updateFolder(folder.copy(isNotificationsEnabled = value))
37→            "folder_settings_push" -> updateFolder(folder.copy(isPushEnabled = value))
38→            "folder_settings_visible" -> updateFolder(folder.copy(isVisible = value))
39→            else -> error("Unknown key: $key")
40→        }
41→    }
42→
43→    private fun updateFolder(newFolder: FolderDetails) {
44→        folder = newFolder
45→        saveScope.launch {
46→            folderRepository.updateFolderDetails(account, newFolder)
47→        }
48→    }
49→}

34→            .thenBy(String.CASE_INSENSITIVE_ORDER) { it.folder.name }

36→    private fun getDisplayFolders(account: Account, includeHiddenFolders: Boolean): List<DisplayFolder> {
37→        val messageStore = messageStoreManager.getMessageStore(account.uuid)
38→        return messageStore.getDisplayFolders(
39→            includeHiddenFolders = includeHiddenFolders,
40→            outboxFolderId = account.outboxFolderId,
41→        ) { folder ->
42→            DisplayFolder(
43→                folder = Folder(
44→                    id = folder.id,
45→                    name = folder.name,
46→                    type = FolderTypeMapper.folderTypeOf(account, folder.id),
47→                    isLocalOnly = folder.isLocalOnly,
48→                ),
49→                isInTopGroup = folder.isInTopGroup,
50→                unreadMessageCount = folder.unreadMessageCount,
51→                starredMessageCount = folder.starredMessageCount,
52→            )
53→        }.sortedWith(sortForDisplay)
54→    }
55→
56→    fun getDisplayFoldersFlow(account: Account, includeHiddenFolders: Boolean): Flow<List<DisplayFolder>> {
57→        val messageStore = messageStoreManager.getMessageStore(account.uuid)
58→
59→        return callbackFlow {
60→            send(getDisplayFolders(account, includeHiddenFolders))
61→
62→            val folderStatusChangedListener = object : SimpleMessagingListener() {
63→                override fun folderStatusChanged(statusChangedAccount: Account, folderId: Long) {
64→                    if (statusChangedAccount.uuid == account.uuid) {
65→                        trySendBlocking(getDisplayFolders(account, includeHiddenFolders))
66→                    }
67→                }
68→            }
69→            messagingController.addListener(folderStatusChangedListener)
70→
71→            val folderSettingsChangedListener = FolderSettingsChangedListener {
72→                trySendBlocking(getDisplayFolders(account, includeHiddenFolders))
73→            }
74→            messageStore.addFolderSettingsChangedListener(folderSettingsChangedListener)
75→
76→            awaitClose {
77→                messagingController.removeListener(folderStatusChangedListener)
78→                messageStore.removeFolderSettingsChangedListener(folderSettingsChangedListener)
79→            }
80→        }.buffer(capacity = Channel.CONFLATED)
81→            .distinctUntilChanged()
82→            .flowOn(coroutineContext)
83→    }
84→
85→    fun getDisplayFoldersFlow(accountUuid: String): Flow<List<DisplayFolder>> {
86→        val account = accountManager.getAccount(accountUuid) ?: error("Account not found: $accountUuid")
87→        return getDisplayFoldersFlow(account, includeHiddenFolders = false)
88→    }
89→}
